results.rendered_html: evayāvan (2. eva + yā˚) adj. so v. a. evayā, Beiw. Viṣṇuʼs und der Marut: uta no viyo goagrāḥ pūṣanviṣṇavevayāvaḥ . kartā na svastimataḥ  ṚV. 1,90,5 . von Viṣṇu 7,100,2 . tānvo maho maruta evayāvno viṣṇoreṣasya prabhṛthe havāmahe 2,34,11 . yebhiḥ śivaḥ svavā~ evayāvabhirdivaḥ siṣakti svayaśā nikāmabhiḥ 10,92,9 . (dhenuḥ) yā mṛḻīke marutāṃ turāṇāṃ yā sumnairevayāvarī 6,48,12 .
